[[File:Professor Oat PFP .png|thumb]] :''Main article: [[Professor Oat's Lab]]'' '''Professor Oat''' is the "leading caregiver" for all unhatched [[Micropets]]. If you do not have a micropet egg, he will eventually pop up on your game screen and offer you one. Alternatively, you can go to [[Professor Oat's Lab]] to talk to him, and he will give you one. Each egg hatches a random micropet. It might be a previous seasonal event pet, or a color variant, or something completely unexpected. To hatch an egg you must link it to a goal. Each time you complete it, the egg will grow. After 7 days it will hatch. Like other NPCs, he has a [[Legendary Plushie Collection|line of plushies]]. There are eight colors, and each costs 15k rainbow stones. == Lore == On June 5, 2025, the official Finch instagram account @finchcare posted an illustrated backstory for Professor Oat called "The Legend of Professor Oat:"External link @'''[https://www.instagram.com/finchcare/ finchcare]''': [https://www.instagram.com/p/DKhY8zpOdtX/?igsh=bzN1bm1xaG0zbzZu The Legend of Professor Oat] (June 5, 2025)
Once upon a time, a llama named Oat was a student at a prestigious university. Oat had never planned to go far from home, but when an exchange opportunity came up, he decided to take the leap... and thats how he landed in Finchieverse! He found his passion working with micropets and teaching people all about them. At first, it was quite a culture shock. But over time, Oat learned to love it. He loved it so much, he decided to stay once the exchange program ended. Oat became Professor Oat, and though he is still getting used to things in Finchieverse, he's so glad it's his new home. The End.
